sentences.english: I carry a water bottle to school every day.
It is blue and has a cute sticker on it.
My teacher says we should drink eight glasses of water a day.
sentences.korean: 선생님은 하루에 물 8잔을 마셔야 한다고 하세요.

sentences.english: Drinking water helps me focus in class.
sentences.korean: 물을 마시면 수업에 집중하는 데 도움이 돼요.

sentences.english: I refill it at the water fountain during break time.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
